insights: Added Pause variant to Command enum with id field and doc comment
Placed Pause variant logically between Retry and Kill (lifecycle-related operations)
Added match arm in async main() at line 578 to dispatch Pause command
Follows established command dispatch pattern (enum variant → cards::cmd_* function call)
Added cmd_pause() stub function immediately after cmd_retry()
Parameters prefixed with underscore (_root, _id) to suppress unused variable warnings
Uses anyhow::bail!() for early-stage unimplemented error pattern
Positioned in same function section as other card lifecycle commands (retry, kill, approve)

patterns_discovered.description: Incomplete commands use anyhow::bail!("<command> not yet implemented") allowing enum variant to exist before logic is ready
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows wiring CLI layer before implementation; fails fast with clear message

patterns_discovered.description: Each Command enum variant routes to a cards::cmd_* function in match arm
Unused function parameters prefixed with _ to silence compiler warnings in stub implementations

gotchas_discovered.detail: Command is wired and will parse successfully, but runtime execution will always fail. Actual pause logic (state machine transition, persistence) not implemented.
No specification of what 'paused' state means for cards - does it require a new filesystem state (paused/)? How does resume work? What triggers dispatch of paused cards?

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully added Pause command variant to CLI enum and wired dispatch handler
approach_outcome.scope_achieved: CLI plumbing complete - command recognized by parser and routed to handler function
approach_outcome.scope_not_achieved: Actual pause logic (card state transition, resume mechanism) deferred to future subtask

recommendations.recommendation: Define pause semantics in next subtask - specify filesystem state (paused/ directory?), metadata flags, or dispatch queue mechanism
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation will always error; need clear state model before implementing cmd_pause logic

recommendations.recommendation: Add acceptance criteria for pause that verify state transition - not just CLI parsing
recommendations.rationale: Command exists and parses, but acceptance criteria must test actual pause behavior (finding card in running/, moving to paused state, blocking dispatch)

recommendations.recommendation: Consider pairing with resume command - pause without resume path leaves cards orphaned
recommendations.rationale: Lifecycle completeness; users need way to unblock paused cards

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration test for pause command after implementation
recommendations.rationale: Verify full flow: create card → run → pause → verify paused state → resume → verify dispatch resumes
